code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut total = 0
    mut start = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i <= n
      mut is_ws = false
      if i == n
        is_ws = true
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            is_ws = true
          end
        when None
          is_ws = false
        end
      end
      if is_ws
        if start < i
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            if v > 0
              total = total + v * 2
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("result=#{total}")
  when None
    println("result=0")
  end
end
